ValidationRule.description: If current User is SDR Profile and is not the previous owner, admin or salesops the change of owner is disallowed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( OwnerId ) && $User.Id <> PRIORVALUE( OwnerId ) && $Profile.Name = "SW SDR" && $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only current Owner or SalesOps may change Opportunity Owner.
